title: Department Manager Vacancy at HomeTown Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at HomeTown Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HomeTown Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About HomeTown Global Group:
HomeTown Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
